LA 94( ), ARG 25 S, 2006, | FLAL 1207(3), AW 27 qATE, 2006 s H A 679(), TG 27 e, 2007 T FEB AC | MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS ORDER New Delhi, the 26th July, 2007 8.0. 1219(E).—Whereas in pursuance of the order dated 7th January, 1998 of the Hon’ble Supreme Court in Wit Petition (C) No. 13029 of 1985, the Central Government constituted the Environment Pollution (Prevention and Control) Authority (EPCA), vide Notification No. $.0. 93(E), dated 29th January, 1998; And whereas the said Authority was constifuted with the objective of protecting and improving the guality @) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [ParTIl—Sec. 3] of the environment and preventing and controlling environmental pollution in the National Capital Region; And whereas the said Authority is assisting the Hon'ble Supreme Court in various environment related matters in the National Capital Region in terms of the above referred Notification, And whereas the tenure of the said Authority was extended from time to time by the Central Government and lastly it was extended on 27th April. 2007, And whereas the Central Government considers its necessary 1o extend the tenure of the said Authority for a further period of one year so that the Authority is able to address those important issues relating to pollution in the Nationat Capital Region; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-scctions (13 and (3) of Section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the tollowing further amendmentin the Order of the Government of India in the Minisiry of Environment and Forests, number 8.0. 93(E), dated the 29th January, 1998, namely :— In the satd Order, 1n paragraph 1, for the words “fora period of nize years and six months™, the words “for aperiod of ten years and six months or ill alternative arrangements are made under Section 3(3) of Eavironment (Protection} Act. 1986, whichever is carlier” shall be substituted. F. No. Q-18011/13/2000-CPA| R K. VAISH,Jt. Secy. Note —~The principal Order was published i the Gazette of Indiavide No. $.0. 93(E), dated the 29th January, 1998 and subsequently amended vide No. S.0. 68(E), dated the 25th January, 2000, No. S$.0. 108(E), dated the 25th January, 2002, No. 8.0. 99(F), dated the 28th January, 2003, No. $.0.396(E}, dated the 3rd April, 2003, No. 8.0. 94(E), dated the 25th January, 2006, No. $.0. 1207(E), dated the 27th July, 2006 and No. S.0.679(F). dated the 27th April, 2007.
